Headline: #54 Cicero Temporary Reroute at Cicero/Lake
ShortDescription: #54 Cicero buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Cicero, Washington, Laramie, Chicago and Cicero due to fire department activity nr Cicero/Lake.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#54 Cicero buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Cicero, Washington, Laramie, Chicago, then resume their normal route on Cicero.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to fire department activity near Cicero/Lake.
